case_title: YANRONG YANG MU VS. MIN WEI WU

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MU, YANRONG YANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, MIN WEI $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: $500 EACH 1ST OF THE MONTH UNTIL APRIL 1, 2016.

THIS DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY INTERPRETER, PHOEBE CHAN IN THE MANDARIN LANGUAGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
